mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neurological symptoms (depression, perseverative thought), visceromegaly (hepatosplenomegaly, ascending aortic aneurysm)
skin involvement (erythema, angioedema, linear hyperpigmentation), cardiovascular issues (hypertension, heart murmurs)
epilepsy, mental retardation, facial features (facial angiofibromas, shagreen patches), and other manifestations such as renal cysts or liver fibrosis
cafe au lait spots, freckles, iris hamartomas, scoliosis, optic glioma, and bone deformities
short stature, coarse face, corneal opacifications, skeletal anomalies, hearing loss, and respiratory problems
early-onset diabetes mellitus, sensorineural hearing impairments, obesity, dilated cardiomyopathy, and pigmentary retinitis
dwarfism, joint stiffness, kyphoscoliosis, hernias, and dental caries
progressive cognitive decline, speech difficulties, coarsening of facial features, and seizures
demyelination leading to motor deficiencies, visual disturbances, and hearing loss
